name: Goat Cheese Torta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the goat cheese and cream cheese together.
2. Add the minced garlic to the mixture.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and black pepper if desired.
4. Line a small glass bowl (about 2-3 cups) with plastic wrap.
5. Place about one-third of the goat cheese mixture into the bowl.
6. Top this layer with pesto sauce.
7. Add another third of the goat cheese mixture on top.
8. Sprinkle sun-dried tomatoes over the layers.
9. Cover with the remaining goat cheese.
10. Wrap the bowl tightly with plastic wrap.
11. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, up to four days.
To serve:
1. Invert the bowl onto a serving dish.
2. Carefully remove the plastic wrap.
3. Garnish with herbaceous materials.
4. Serve with baguettes. This recipe serves approximately 10-15 people.
